---
title: Stratum self-select and large block templates
source_url: https://github.com/xmrig/xmrig/issues/1440
author: trasherdk
assignees: []
labels:
- need feedback
created_at: '2019-12-18T08:47:46+00:00'
updated_at: '2020-04-03T13:27:26+00:00'
type: issue
status: closed
closed_at: '2020-04-03T13:27:26+00:00'
---

# Original Description
Here `xmrig 5.3.1-dev` barfs on a 8Kb block template

monero-pool
```
2019-12-18 04:23:58 TRACE src/pool.c:1513: Got block template: 
{
  "id": "0",
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "result": {
    "blockhashing_blob": "0c0ccdb7e6ef0586531b5f27a7e1aae49eec7336437efe6cb53df9b331c6f0d3949b4f2e2da2b6000000006ae49a166e69796ec0fb52dccce285713808de5c63ac3dfcd0124b601f7f08e779",
    "blocktemplate_blob": "",
    "difficulty": 115388745053,
    "difficulty_top64": 0,
    "expected_reward": 2078064223906,
    "height": 1991301,
    "next_seed_hash": "",
    "prev_hash": "86531b5f27a7e1aae49eec7336437efe6cb53df9b331c6f0d3949b4f2e2da2b6",
    "reserved_offset": 128,
    "seed_hash": "9d4fe3c9677150caab858e022af03eee8ef2e12cb21afe94c837b4021a81d6ef",
    "seed_height": 1990656,
    "status": "OK",
    "untrusted": false,
    "wide_difficulty": "0x1addb4855d"
  }
}
2019-12-18 04:23:58 TRACE src/pool.c:838: Recycle block template at height: 1991297
2019-12-18 04:23:58 TRACE src/pool.c:1282: Variant: 6
2019-12-18 04:23:58 DEBUG src/pool.c:859: Client 1c855246cd8348479c5ac243c948d83b target now 131829
2019-12-18 04:23:58 TRACE src/pool.c:1146: Client job: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"job","params":{"id":"1c855246cd8348479c5ac243c948d83b","job_id":"fe93085df65743418e99861445617e12","target":"437f0000","extra_nonce":"e508000081b4ba43", "pool_wallet":"44ch1jLCFmuHpsq6QMCWxMXMGbMdrEF9AHiMrzqBjPc5WyToE2eoXqEJZV7GpVMPxxCxBewpG9FCjY1riMccS6f8Fq6v5iV","seed_hash":"","next_seed_hash":""}}

2019-12-18 04:24:23 INFO  src/pool.c:2000: New client connected
2019-12-18 04:24:23 TRACE src/pool.c:2087: Client login for mode: self-select
```

xmrig-5.3.1-dev
```
[2019-12-18 04:23:36.173] speed 10s/60s/15m 1135.7 1118.8 1028.3 H/s max 1175.8 H/s
[2019-12-18 04:24:06.214] speed 10s/60s/15m 1029.5 1116.8 1027.2 H/s max 1175.8 H/s
[2019-12-18 04:24:18.764]  net  no active pools, stop mining
[2019-12-18 04:24:23.775]  net  use pool localhost:8002  127.0.0.1
[2019-12-18 04:24:36.281] speed 10s/60s/15m n/a 1086.8 1040.8 H/s max 1175.8 H/s
[2019-12-18 04:24:43.813]  net  no active pools, stop mining
[2019-12-18 04:24:48.817]  net  use pool localhost:8002  127.0.0.1
[2019-12-18 04:25:06.343] speed 10s/60s/15m n/a 1042.5 1038.5 H/s max 1175.8 H/s
[2019-12-18 04:25:26.864]  net  no active pools, stop mining
```


# Discussion History
## xmrig | 2019-12-20T16:56:07+00:00
Can you rebuild recent dev branch (I added one extra error message) with `-DWITH_DEBUG_LOG=ON`.
Thank you.

## trasherdk | 2019-12-23T02:41:24+00:00
Some weirdness in the log. Time is GMT+2 (Copenhagen)

**XMRig/5.4.0-dev**
```
[2019-12-23 01:40:24.210] [localhost:8002] received (65 bytes): "{"id":4470,"jsonrpc":"2.0","error":null,"result":{"status":"OK"}}"
[2019-12-23 01:40:24.210]  net  new job from localhost:8002 diff 127534 algo rx/0 height 1994817
[2019-12-23 01:40:24.271]  cpu  stopped (61 ms)
[2019-12-23 01:40:24.274]  rx   init dataset algo rx/0 (4 threads) seed 8fd8d3ee74547743...
[2019-12-23 01:40:31.834]  rx   dataset ready (7560 ms)
[2019-12-23 01:40:31.834]  cpu  use profile  rx  (4 threads) scratchpad 2048 KB
[2019-12-23 01:40:31.910]  cpu  READY threads 4/4 (4) huge pages 100% 4/4 memory 8192 KB (60 ms)
[2019-12-23 01:40:39.334] speed 10s/60s/15m n/a n/a n/a H/s max 1173.5 H/s
[2019-12-23 01:40:47.013] [localhost:8002] send (236 bytes): "{"id":4471,"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"submit","params":{"id":"ed298e4e0085443f8533aa60df1d0de7","job_id":"36e84e36d7a445d59d2b420f799a06a5","nonce":"1b0f0000","result":"e84a9bf9102df8ce3849ef8ec9a5c16aa2b5c9019b765d5bf36d30c3ed820000"}}"
[2019-12-23 01:41:07.693] [localhost:8002] timeout
[2019-12-23 01:41:07.693] [localhost:8002] state: "connected" -> "closing"
[2019-12-23 01:41:07.694] [localhost:8002] state: "closing" -> "unconnected"
[2019-12-23 01:41:07.694] [localhost:8002] state: "unconnected" -> "reconnecting"
[2019-12-23 01:41:07.694]  net  no active pools, stop mining
[2019-12-23 01:41:09.377] speed 10s/60s/15m 541.3 n/a n/a H/s max 1173.5 H/s
[2019-12-23 01:41:13.694] [localhost:8002] state: "reconnecting" -> "host-lookup"
[2019-12-23 01:41:13.694] [localhost:8002] state: "host-lookup" -> "connecting"
[2019-12-23 01:41:13.694] [localhost:8002] state: "connecting" -> "connected"
[2019-12-23 01:41:13.695] [localhost:8002] send (556 bytes): "{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"login","params":{"login":"49XW5.....E5Md2v","pass":"GHOST-M1","agent":"XMRig/5.4.0-dev (Linux x86_64) libuv/1.23.2 gcc/5.5.0","rigid":"GHOST-M1","mode":"self-select","algo":["rx/0","cn/2","cn/r","cn/fast","cn/half","cn/xao","cn/rto","cn/rwz","cn/zls","cn/double","cn/gpu","cn-lite/1","cn-heavy/0","cn-heavy/tube","cn-heavy/xhv","cn-pico","cn/1","rx/wow","rx/loki","rx/arq","rx/sfx","rx/v","argon2/chukwa","argon2/wrkz"]}}"
[2019-12-23 01:41:13.712] [localhost:8002] received (355 bytes): "{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","error":null,"result":{"id":"c3d039c5ff664839a638f92e657306d2","job":{"job_id":"dd5112b451414c829645c99dddd6ad66","target":"8b4f0100","extra_nonce":"7d0c00008c059522", "pool_wallet":"44ch1....v5iV","seed_hash":"","next_seed_hash":""},"status":"OK"}}"
[2019-12-23 01:41:13.712]  net  use pool localhost:8002  127.0.0.1
[2019-12-23 01:41:13.712] [localhost:18081] "POST /json_rpc" send (214 bytes): "{"id":1404,"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"getblocktemplate","params":{"wallet_address":"44ch1j.....6v5iV","extra_nonce":"7d0c00008c059522"}}"
```
**monero-pool**
```
2019-12-23 01:40:47 TRACE src/pool.c:2262: Client submitted nonce=3867, result=e84a9bf9102df8ce3849ef8ec9a5c16aa2b5c9019b765d5bf36d30c3ed820000
2019-12-23 01:40:47 TRACE src/pool.c:2334: Submission reserved values: 3867 3196 0 0
2019-12-23 01:41:07 TRACE src/pool.c:2421: Checking hash against blobk difficulty: 112011349292, job difficulty: 127532
2019-12-23 01:41:07 DEBUG src/pool.c:2476: Storing share with difficulty: 127532
2019-12-23 01:41:07 DEBUG src/pool.c:2602: Client disconnected. Removing.

2019-12-23 01:41:13 DEBUG src/pool.c:859: Client c3d039c5ff664839a638f92e657306d2 target now 50000
2019-12-23 01:41:13 TRACE src/pool.c:1146: Client job: {"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","error":null,"result":{"id":"c3d039c5ff664839a638f92e657306d2","job":{"job_id":"dd5112b451414c829645c99dddd6ad66","target
":"8b4f0100","extra_nonce":"7d0c00008c059522", "pool_wallet":"44ch1....6v5iV","seed_hash":"","next_seed_hash":""},"status":"OK"}}

2019-12-23 01:41:13 TRACE src/pool.c:2194: Variant: 6
2019-12-23 01:41:13 TRACE src/pool.c:2208: Client set template: 
2019-12-23 01:41:23 TRACE src/pool.c:2262: Client submitted nonce=2369, result=3a4d5fa965ff363d486fddc4af208e0f155a2728cfb22d9d5249a77f8f080000
```


## trasherdk | 2019-12-25T05:48:52+00:00
Here's a nasty one, that ends with `monero-pool` crashing hard.

Full log-files:
[xmrig-v5.3.1.log.gz](http://monero-pool.fumlersoft.dk/xmrig-v5.3.1.log.gz)  (**XMRig/5.4.0-dev**)
[monero-pool.log.gz](http://monero-pool.fumlersoft.dk/monero-pool.log.gz)

Monero pool source:
[monero-pool with pool fee wallet](https://github.com/trasherdk/dev-monero-pool/tree/dev-fork)

*This is one line in the log-file*
```
[2019-12-24 04:25:12.746] [localhost:18081] received (9467 bytes): "{
  "id": 2194,
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "result": {
    "blockhashing_blob": "0c0c988a86f005dcb38c4b8c3fc62d3e8973f650b427bcbdf08ddcf4dea2f9769bb85b57a0edc9000000001e90d4865ae3b110d73c7fead4ab87ae70eee2d63ef33f1500d01151118644918501",
    "blocktemplate_blob": "
    	[2019-12-24 04:25:12.746] [localhost:8002] send (9106 bytes): "{"id":7043,"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"block_template","params":{"id":"c3d039c5ff664839a638f92e657306d2","job_id":"0d177d8ff3d54edc82cefa752cc7d7e1","blob":"
    	[2019-12-24 04:25:32.898] speed 10s/60s/15m 1035.3 1092.9 1050.4 H/s max 1173.5 H/s
```
Above line in context:
```
[2019-12-24 04:25:12.650] [localhost:8002] received (328 bytes): "{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"job","params":{"id":"c3d039c5ff664839a638f92e657306d2","job_id":"0d177d8ff3d54edc82cefa752cc7d7e1","target":"fd850000","extra_nonce":"930f00008c059522", "pool_wallet":"44ch....v5iV","seed_hash":"","next_seed_hash":""}}"
```
